zh.Tankersley, Wortley, West Riding Yorkshi: 英國英格蘭越可爾坦可斯利

zh-hans.Tankersley, Wortley, West Riding Yorkshi: 英国英格兰越可爾坦可斯利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan de Tankersley于1125年之前与Jordan de Tankersley在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tankersley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Tankersley in Yorkshire, named from the Old English personal name Thancrēd (genitive Thancrēdes) + Old English lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’. This surname has now died out in Britain.
occasional variant of Donkersley, itself a variant of Dunkerley , see Dunkley .

variants.name: Tanksley
meanings: Apparently a shortened form of   Tankersley  .

nameMeanings.name: Jordan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a name given to a child of either sex baptized in holy water that was, purportedly at least, brought from the River Jordan, whose Hebrew name, ha-yarden, means ‘flowing down’. It was in this river that Christ was baptized by John the Baptist, and medieval pilgrims to the Holy Land usually tried to bring back a flask of its water with them. The modern given name is either a revival of this, or else a transferred use of the surname that was derived from the medieval given name. It is more popular as a boy's name in Britain and as a girl's name in the United States.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan de Tankersley married Jordan de Tankersley before 1125, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan de Tankersley a épousé Jordan de Tankersley avant 1125, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan de Tankersley hat vor 1125 in England Jordan de Tankersley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan de Tankersley lei sposato Jordan de Tankersley prima del 1125, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.Tankersley, Wortley, West Riding Yorkshi: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアタンケルスリー
ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan de Tankersleyは1125年以前にイギリスでJordan de Tankersleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan de Tankersley(은)는 1125년 이전 영국에서 Jordan de Tankersley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan de Tankersley casou-se com Jordan de Tankersley antes 1125, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan de Tankersley вышла замуж за человека по имени Jordan de Tankersley перед 1125 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan de Tankersley se casó con Jordan de Tankersley antes de 1125, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
